notes.note:
Tab groups can now be long-pressed to select multiple items in both list and grid views. ([Bug 2041089][1])


  [1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2041089

Fixed an issue where Shake to Summarize was missing from AI Controls and could still be offered even after AI features were turned off. ([Bug 2048993][1])


  [1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2048993

Fixed a regression that could break playback of some MP4 video files. ([Bug 2047467][1])


  [1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2047467

Fixed an issue where a newly created tab group could fail to appear in the tab manager. ([Bug 2045094][1])


  [1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2045094

text:
Thanks for using Firefox! Have feedback or suggestions? Join the conversation on [Mozilla Connect][1]. Need help? Our volunteer support community has you covered on [Mozilla Support][2] 

[1]: https://connect.mozilla.org/
[2]: https://mzl.la/AndroidSupport
title: Firefox for Android 152.0.2 Release
